message:
perf(mux): optimize frame processing - reduce CPU from 50% to 20%

Key optimizations:
- Add partial_delta frame type: skip compression for small changes (<500KB)
- Use SIMD std.mem.eql for 4KB block comparisons
- IOSurface seed check to skip unchanged surfaces
- Single memcpy when strides match
- Keyframe interval increased to 60 seconds

For cursor blink: sends 243KB uncompressed instead of compressing 14MB
